strap: Aberdeen Energy draws £652m of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,527 grants, anchored by Aberdeen (42%), James Hutton Institute (25%), with Neccus on the industrial side. 6 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £109m UKRI per spin-out.
